item.title: Cheap Web
item.description: Ref: https://potato.cheap/ This piece evoked the following emotions: Strong alignment in principle around how I envision Web technology (in general, any tech) to work. Reminded me of the Low Tech Magazine. Introduced me to the idea of Solarpunk - as a Cyberpunk derivative. A wobbly wooden chair built by a friend beats any designer chair. Websites/web apps built around static web pages (like this blog) are a great example of “Cheap Web”.
